useCases.title: AI Research & Strategy Signoff
useCases.audience: AI consultants, agencies, client reviewers, executives
useCases.prompt: I delivered an AI research report to a client and need proof that it is ready to accept.
useCases.outcome: Turn an AI-assisted report into an acceptance-ready package with claim checks, source freshness, uncertainty notes, reviewer decision, and Mission Receipt.
steps: Define the assignment and success criteria.
Map every important claim to evidence or mark it uncertain.
Check missing citations, stale sources, broken links, and required sections.
Send a simple ACCEPTED / NEEDS CHANGES / REJECTED review path.
Issue a Mission Receipt with limitations and timestamps.

useCases.title: Client Delivery Acceptance
useCases.audience: Small AI agencies, software contractors, automation teams
useCases.prompt: I finished a client automation project and need the client to accept it with evidence, tests, risks, and a receipt.
useCases.outcome: Convert a project handoff into a clear acceptance decision tied to deliverables, tests, screenshots, run logs, risk disclosures, and limitations.
steps: Freeze what done means.
Attach deliverables and evidence references.
Check acceptance criteria, tests, risk notes, and open issues.
Route to the client decision.
Preserve the accepted record as a receipt.

useCases.title: DAO Grant Milestone Proof
useCases.audience: DAOs, grant committees, treasury councils, protocol foundations
useCases.prompt: We need to release a DAO grant milestone only if the evidence package passes review.
useCases.outcome: Require a proof package before a milestone is treated as settlement-ready: mission, evidence, replay, reviewer notes, challenge window, and public receipt.
steps: Define the grant milestone and prohibited claims.
Collect evidence and map it to criteria.
Run proof and replay checks.
Route to independent reviewers or delegates.
Mark the milestone ready only after the receipt is accepted.

useCases.title: Audit Remediation & Protocol Upgrade
useCases.audience: Protocol teams, security leads, auditors, governance delegates
useCases.prompt: We fixed audit findings and need a proof package before a protocol upgrade is approved.
useCases.outcome: Turn fixes into a reviewable remediation packet: finding, fix, tests, replay, rollback plan, residual risk, and approval receipt.
steps: List findings and claimed fixes.
Attach test evidence and replay instructions.
Record risk boundaries and rollback obligations.
Route reviewer signoff and challenge window.
Issue a proof-to-action receipt.

useCases.title: Understand the 48 Mainnet Trust Rails
useCases.audience: Founders, protocol operators, investors, auditors, partners
useCases.prompt: Show me which 48 Mainnet contracts support Signoff Verified, Secured, and Signoff & Settle.
useCases.outcome: Explain the 48 GoalOS-created Ethereum Mainnet contracts by family, product tier, proof stage, safety boundary, and Etherscan route.
steps: Choose a Signoff tier.
Inspect the relevant contract families.
Read contract pages in plain English.
Open Etherscan when needed.
Keep Basic off-chain and activate rails only when authorized.

useCases.title: Proof-to-Payment Simulation
useCases.audience: Clients, agents, reviewers, protocol operators, treasury teams
useCases.prompt: I want payment to release only after accepted proof, reviewer signoff, and a challenge window.
useCases.outcome: Model the transition from simple acceptance to optional proof-to-payment: evidence, review, bond, dispute, reward, and treasury routing.
steps: Define the job and reward boundary.
Require a proof bundle before acceptance.
Route accountable review.
Hold a challenge window.
Release only when authorized and audited.

useCases.title: RSI / Move-37 Breakthrough Dossier
useCases.audience: Frontier labs, governance teams, safety leads, councils
useCases.prompt: Govern a Move-37 breakthrough candidate with replay, stress tests, persistence gates, and a dossier.
useCases.outcome: Route a high-novelty candidate through deterministic RSI governance: target, emit, filter, atlas, test-plan, eval, insert, promote.
steps: Recognize novelty and baseline advantage.
Reproduce with fixed seeds and verified hashes.
Stress-test under policy shocks.
Require persistence before promotion.
Package the dossier for council review.

useCases.title: Stakeholder Proof Request
useCases.audience: Users, investors, public reviewers, partners, boards
useCases.prompt: I am reviewing a project and need to ask: where is the proof package?
useCases.outcome: Give a nontechnical reviewer a simple checklist: mission, evidence, replay, validation, risk ledger, decision, receipt.
steps: Ask for the proof package.
Check the mission and criteria.
Inspect evidence and replay readiness.
Review risk and uncertainty.
Decide whether trust should escalate.
